name: tree-of-thoughts
description: Tree of Thoughts MCP server — structured multi-path reasoning with persistent storage, hybrid retrieval, knowledge graph, experiment runner, and live dashboard

interface.shortDescription: Structured multi-path reasoning with persistent knowledge
interface.longDescription: 39 MCP tools, 21 skills, 7 agents for deep research, decision-making, knowledge management, and autonomous experiments. Single binary, zero config, live dashboard.
defaultPrompt: Use Tree of Thoughts to research this problem deeply
Use Tree of Thoughts to decide between these options
Use Tree of Thoughts to review and maintain the knowledge base
